description: Organization-wide analytics platform serving multiple business units with shared infrastructure. Supports diverse workloads from batch analytics to real-time decisioning.
useCases: Enterprise-wide analytics platform across multiple BUs
Multiple concurrent production use cases (fraud, risk, marketing, operations)
Cross-functional data science with governed model deployment
hadrNotes: Multi-AZ required. Active-active CAS for compute resilience. RPO <1hr, RTO <30min.
cloudVsOnprem: Hybrid common — compute burst in cloud, sensitive data on-prem with secure connectivity. Multi-environment (dev/test/prod) standard.
typicalCustomers: Top-5 universal banks, large telcos, conglomerates, government agencies with national mandates
